description: Message replay vulnerabilities occur when an attacker can reuse a valid message or transaction to perform unauthorized actions. This can lead to: - Unauthorized access to sensitive functions. - Loss of funds or data. - Exploitation of the contract's logic.
name: Message Replay Vulnerabilities
remediation: - **Use nonces:** Include a unique nonce in each message to prevent reuse. - **Validate timestamps:** Ensure messages are only valid for a limited time. - **Implement replay protection:** Use established libraries or mechanisms to prevent replay attacks.
